THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIMES, KENNETH AKA KENNETH BLODGER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.94, EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT STAYED PENDING THE FINAL OUTCOME OF DEFENDANT'S WORKER'S COMPENSATION CLAIM/OR APPEAL. REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS ON JUDGMENT; FILED BY DEFENDANT GRIMES, KENNETH AKA KENNETH BLODGER

HEARING ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SMALL CLAIMS) PER COMMISSIONER SLAVIT'S ORDER. FILED BY KENNETH GRIMES IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $50.00 ON JANUARY 27, 2001 AND ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING 15, 2011. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
